transcript: Speaker A: Hello, what is your name? Speaker B: My name is Rahul. Speaker A: How old are you? Speaker B: I have 22. Speaker A: 'I have 22' nahi, 'I am 22 years old' hota hai. ['I have 22' no, it is 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I am Uttar Pradesh. Speaker A: 'I am Uttar Pradesh' nahi, 'I am from Uttar Pradesh' hoga. ['I am Uttar Pradesh' no, it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Speaker B: Oh... theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?] Speaker B: Wow toh mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isiliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A: Yeh install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: what is your name, My name is Rahul, How old are you?, I have 22, I am 22 yrs old, Okay okay, I am 22 years old, Where are you from?, I am Uttar Pradesh, I am from Uttar Pradesh, Ohh... theek hai [Ohh... okay], Mujhe English [Me English], aati [know], Koi problem nahi [No problem], AI teachers try, hote honge na [must be], Bilkul nahi [Not at all], classes se 7 guna [7 times than classes], 7X CHEAPER, isiliye 50 [that's why 50], MySivi AI English Speakin..., Install, 5M+ Downloads, Par time nahi [But no time], Roz ki sirf 15-20 [Daily just 15-20], kaafi hai [is enough], ho jaoge [will become], Wow, kaise [Wow, how], Yeh install [This install], MySivi AI English Speakin..., Install, Master Spoken Eng, Sirf 15 dino mein [In just 15 days], tumhe improvement [you improvement], Chalo [Come on], ME NO ENGLISH, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A man with 'ME NO ENGLISH' written on his back gets his English grammar corrected by a giant AI avatar in a desert. The AI promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, 15-minute daily solution to learn English. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
